name: Loaf Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Bake the cake mix in a loaf pan for 33 to 38 minutes, or until done.
3. Remove from oven and let cool slightly.
4. Poke holes all over the cooled cake.
5. Pour Eagle Brand milk evenly over the top of the cake.
6. Spread Cool Whip evenly over the cake.
7. Arrange pineapple pieces on top of the Cool Whip.
8. Sprinkle coconut flakes over the pineapple.
9. Place the pan in the refrigerator until ready to serve.
10. Cut into small pieces before serving.
